title: No evidence for conspiracy theory that Biden is behind Trump charges
shortDescription: Trump accused Biden of playing a role in his prosecution in New York. Experts say Biden doesn't have that power – and there's no proof he's involved.

title: Eleven sent to Phoenix hospital at Trump rally
shortDescription: Thousands of people showed up in Phoenix, Arizona to support former president Donald Trump, with 11 going to the hospital due to the extreme heat.

title: Biden on D-Day anniversary: 'Let us be worthy of their sacrifice'
shortDescription: President Biden talked of Ukraine on the anniversary of D-Day. The latest on former President Trump's search for a VP. These and more on The Excerpt.

title: Israeli PM Benjamin Netanyahu to address Congress on July 24
shortDescription: This will be Netanyahu's fourth speech to a joint session of Congress, the most times for a foreign leader and breaking a tie with Winston Churchill.

title: In record heat, Trump fans flock to see him in AZ after felony conviction
shortDescription: Thousands turned out to support the former president. At least 11 were taken to hospitals with heat-related issues, Fire Department officials said.

title: Meet the GM retiree, trash picker who found Hunter Biden's gun
shortDescription: A Delaware man with a trash-picking pastime found himself at the center of a national drama testifying at the trial of the president's son.

title: Hunter Biden trial: Prosecution rests cases in gun trial
shortDescription: Witnesses are set to share crucial testimony in Hunter Biden's felony gun trial on Friday. Here's what you need to know.

title: Will Manhattan DA Alvin Bragg seek higher post after convicting Trump?
shortDescription: Manhattan DA Alvin Bragg beat Donald Trump in court, making him a rising star among Democrats. Will he follow past NY prosecutors to higher office?

title: George Clooney called White House over wife's legal work on Gaza, report says
shortDescription: The Washington Post reported Clooney was concerned after President Biden attacked the International Criminal Court, which Amal Clooney had assisted.

title: Trump aide Steve Bannon ordered to prison
shortDescription: Former Donald Trump's aide Steve Bannon was ordered to prison to serve time after his appeal on his contempt of Congress conviction failed.

title: Hallie Biden gives emotional testimony on finding Hunter Biden gun, using drugs
shortDescription: Hallie Biden on Thursday testified about finding a gun Hunter Biden purchased that's now at the center of his felony trial in Delaware.

title: NAACP asks Biden to halt weapons to Israel as he seeks to shore up Black voter support
shortDescription: The NAACP said the U.S. must use its influence with Israel to bring a permanent ceasefire to Gaza.

title: Jeffries, potential Trump running mate clash over Jim Crow comments
shortDescription: The House Minority Leader called out Rep. Byron Donalds for comments he made while trying to court Black voters in Philadelphia this week.

title: Senate Republicans block Right to Contraception Act
shortDescription: Only two GOP lawmakers voted alongside Democrats on the Right to Contraception Act, which would guarantee the right to birth control.

title: Prosecutors use Hunter Biden's memoir in court
shortDescription: Prosecutors in Hunter Biden's gun case are using his memoir, "Beautiful Things," as evidence against him.

title: Who is Doug Burgum, Trump's possible vice president pick?
shortDescription: Doug Burgum, North Dakota governor, may be on Trump's VP shortlist. Who is he?

title: OnPolitics: Is Trump getting closer to choosing a VP?
shortDescription: The Donald Trump campaign has stepped up its vice presidential search, requesting detailed information from at least four of the top contenders.

title: Trump's potential VP candidates in photos
shortDescription: Who could former President Trump choose to be his running mate in the 2024 presidential election? Here's a list of contenders.

title: Judge orders Trump aide Steve Bannon to prison after contempt appeal
shortDescription: A judge ordered Steve Bannon, a political strategist for Donald Trump, to prison for contempt of Congress after he lost his appeal.

title: Biden, Trump supporters still clash on cultural issues, Pew study says
shortDescription: Backers of President Biden and Donald Trump remain deeply divided over immigration, abortion laws, crime and gun rights, a new Pew study indicates.

title: Reproductive rights key issue in election
shortDescription: Both sides of the aisle are saying abortion is a key issue heading into the November 2024 election.

title: VP short list: Trump seeks info from Burgum, Rubio, Vance, and Scott
shortDescription: After the guilty verdict, the presumptive GOP 2024 nominee's White House campaign steps up its vice presidential search.

title: Trump Georgia election case temporarily halted | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Plus: The 80th anniversary of D-Day. | FDA panel finds that new COVID-19 vaccine should target the JN.1 lineage. | School civil rights complaints.

title: Donald Trump focuses on the damage of addictions in Hunter Biden trial
shortDescription: Asked about Hunter Biden's trial on gun charges, Donald Trump talked about ravages of people such as his own brother suffering addiction.

title: Biden said U.S. weapons would not be used to strike Moscow, Kremlin
shortDescription: President Joe Biden said in an interview Thursday that U.S. weapons would not be used to strike Moscow and the Kremlin.

title: 'You want to know the price of freedom?' Biden honors D-Day, WWII vets
shortDescription: From the hallowed ground where many of their comrades rest beneath French soil, WWII veterans accompanied by President Joe Biden commemorate D-Day.
